description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a warm brown leather or leather-like material, featuring three large, loose back cushions and three seat cushions. The sofa is accessorized with two decorative throw pillows—one with a zebra print and another in solid white—and a light-colored throw blanket draped over one armrest. The armrests are straight, slim, and rise to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a clean, boxy silhouette. The legs are thin, black, and metallic, positioned at the corners and slightly inset, providing a minimalistic and airy appearance. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as lofts, lobbies, or stylish waiting areas. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, emphasizing a streamlined and uncluttered look.
description: A modern brown leather sofa with three large cushions, slim straight armrests, and black metal legs, accessorized with two throw pillows and a blanket. The design is sleek, minimalistic, and well-suited for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three seat and back cushions, both throw pillows, and the blanket draped over the right armrest.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the slim profile of the armrest and the arrangement of the throw pillows and blanket.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel and the tops of the three back cushions, with no decorative elements visible.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view emphasizing the depth of the seat, the arrangement of the cushions, and the minimalistic leg design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and three matching seat cushions, all uniform in size and shape, with two decorative throw pillows and a blanket placed on top.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, slim armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four thin, black metal legs positioned at the corners, slightly inset from the edges, with a simple, exposed, and minimalistic design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three large, loose cushions, continuous across the width, and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
